title: YTSpawn
description: This is a simple plugin to setspawn and go to the spawn. The commands are /setspawn and /spawn.
body:
This is a simple plugin which makes it easier to setup a spawn and also go to that spawn by using these following commands. 
Commands:
/setspawn - Can only be ran by operators and it sets the spawn of the server to where the executor is standing at.
/spawn - Takes you to the spawn if spawn is actually set. If not it will display a message saying that spawn is not set using /setspawn command.
